name: LM FUNDING AMERICA, INC.
summary: . LM Funding America, Inc. (we, our, LMFA, or the Company) currently maintains three distinct business operations: our Bitcoin treasury operations, Bitcoin mining business and our specialty finance business. Our investment strategy with respect to our Bitcoin treasury operations involves retaining a majority of our currently held Bitcoin and acquiring new Bitcoin through our mining operations. We may sell or leverage our Bitcoin to support operational needs and strategic initiatives. Our Bitcoin...
